title: I Slay Mobs
description: The Greatest meme from 2017 becomes a reality
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nsjkZnIABq4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I slay mobs is a mod that references the Minecraft parody I made back in 2015 and remastered in 2019


To get the I slay mobs record you just have to simply slay mobs. It's roughly a 1/50 drop. you must have completed the monster slayer advancement first.

To get the remastered version. released in 2019 simply combine the record with a wooden sword

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Sz4RJNkdSFQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xli0OoI28qE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
